# Flex Row Template (`flex-row.ejs`)

Magic's base template for flex row.

## Available Variables
None. This is a static replacement.

## Transformation

**Input (Magic HTML)**
```html
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row">
    <!-- content -->
</div>
```

**Output (Bootstrap Utility)**
```html
<div class="d-flex flex-row">
    <!-- content -->
</div>
```
